description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a predominantly white exterior. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a wide door, flanked by large windows and a paved walkway leading up to it. The house has an expansive outdoor terrace on the upper level, furnished with seating and greenery, as well as a spacious fenced yard on the ground floor. The rear and side elevations show a mix of large and small windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The structure incorporates both open and private outdoor spaces, including a rooftop patio and a ground-level garden area. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on geometric forms and functional outdoor living.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of open terraces and fenced yard areas. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and a white exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, upper terrace with seating, and a fenced yard with greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large fenced yard, multiple windows, and the upper terrace area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows, the extension of the building, and the walkway leading to the house.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the entry path, main door, and the integration of outdoor spaces with the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Wide, modern door with a paved walkway, flanked by planters and minimal decorative elements
